decision: Should we ship the new auth rewrite to 100% of users behind a flag next week?

entries.item: Launch plan enables the new auth path for 100% of users on day one behind a feature flag; the stated rollback is to flip the flag off.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Public demo input; proves only the sample plan state.

entries.item: The new auth path has not been load tested above 30% of projected peak traffic.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Public demo input; coverage gap is directly stated.

entries.item: Legacy auth is removed from the build in the same release; no parallel fallback is retained beyond a 7-day window.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Public demo input; irreversibility after 7 days is treated as a constraint.

entries.item: The support team is staffed for normal volume with no surge plan for an auth-lockout spike.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Treat as an asserted staffing claim, not an audited plan.

entries.item: The main competitor launched a counter-promotion within 72 hours of each of our last three launches.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Public demo input; a three-event pattern, not a guarantee.

entries.item: The feature-flag system depends on the same identity service the auth rewrite modifies.
entries.provenance: Public demo input created for demos/verdicts/war-game-launch-plan.md.
entries.handling: Public demo input; shared dependency is the central abort-path risk.

open_evidence_gaps.claim: Flipping the flag off actually restores service if the modified identity service is degraded.
open_evidence_gaps.would_be_settled_by: A failure-injection test of the flag abort path while the identity service is unhealthy.

notes: Public demo ledger. Do not treat as a live launch file.
